title: PM Awas Yojana (PMAY) - Housing for All

sections.content: Affordable housing scheme. PMAY-Urban: interest subsidy on home loans for EWS/LIG/MIG. PMAY-Gramin: Rs 1.20 lakh (plain) to Rs 1.30 lakh (hilly) grant for house construction in rural areas. Target: Housing for All.

EWS (income up to Rs 3L): subsidy 6.5% on Rs 6L loan for 20 years (saving ~Rs 2.67 lakh). LIG (Rs 3-6L): same. MIG-I (Rs 6-12L): 4% on Rs 9L for 20 years. MIG-II (Rs 12-18L): 3% on Rs 12L for 20 years. Condition: no pucca house in any family member's name anywhere in India.

Selection via Socio Economic Caste Census (SECC) data. No direct application - beneficiaries identified by gram sabha from SECC priority list. Check eligibility: pmayg.nic.in > Stakeholders > IAY/PMAYG Beneficiary. If on list, contact gram panchayat/BDO. Money released in 3 installments linked to construction stages (verified by geo-tagged photos).

Urban: Aadhaar, income proof, property documents, no-home declaration (self + spouse + dependent children), bank loan sanction letter. Rural: Aadhaar (mandatory for DBT), job card (MGNREGA), bank account, land ownership/allotment docs, SECC eligibility.
